task_name: LAP Mentor Team Training - Catharina Hospital Surgical Skills Lab

frame_analyses.description: Title slide: 'LAP Mentor Team Training' and 'Catharina Hospital Surgical Skills Lab'
Three trainees in surgical attire (blue gowns, purple caps, gloves) demonstrating laparoscopic simulator setup. Trainees holding laparoscopic instruments over a green drape training platform.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Team-based training environment; multiple participants observing and practicing simultaneously. Text overlay: 'TEAM TRAINING SETUP PROVIDES HIGH FIDELITY TECHNICAL PRACTICE FOR ALL PARTICIPANTS IN THE PROCEDURE'

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of trainee manipulating laparoscopic instruments at simulator workstation. Monitor displays endoscopic view of internal training task (appears to be suture/knot-tying task with tissue model visible).
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Integrated video monitoring system (Simbionix platform). Trainee demonstrating instrument handling technique with focus on hand positioning and coordination.

frame_analyses.description: Monitor display showing real-time endoscopic view of surgical task. Trainee observing performance feedback on screen. Text overlay: 'REINFORCEMENT OF NON-TECHNICAL SKILLS'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Real-time video feedback integrated into training. Demonstrates monitoring and assessment component of team training.

frame_analyses.description: Multiple trainees at workstation with instructor monitoring endoscopic display. Text overlay: 'ENHANCING COMMUNICATION SKILLS, OPTIMIZING COORDINATION AND COOPERATION WITHIN THE TEAM'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Team-based learning environment emphasizing non-technical skills: communication, situational awareness, coordination.

frame_analyses.description: Trainee performing laparoscopic task with real-time endoscopic view on monitor. Demonstrates surgeon's perspective during simulated procedure.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: High-fidelity simulation providing realistic visual feedback and task complexity.

frame_analyses.description: Scrub nurse simulation: hand holding tablet device displaying Simbionix software interface with tool selection menu (showing instrument options like graspers, scissors, electrosurgical tools).
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Text overlay: 'SCRUB NURSE MAY VIRTUALLY SELECT THE TOOLS AND PRACTICE ANTICIPATION OF SURGEON'S NEEDS'. Demonstrates scrub nurse role in team training.

frame_analyses.description: Monitor showing endoscopic view with active surgical task. Text overlay: 'MASTER THE ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE MAIN SURGEON'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Reinforces role-specific training and surgical decision-making in multi-person team scenarios.

frame_analyses.description: Trainee performing laparoscopic task with real-time monitoring. Tool visible (appears to be electrosurgical or cutting instrument). Text overlay: 'IMPROVING DECISION-MAKING IN BOTH ROUTINE AND EMERGENCY SITUATIONS'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates scenario-based training approach for both standard and crisis management.

frame_analyses.description: Trainee at simulator with endoscopic display on monitor showing active task performance. Real-time feedback system active.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Integrated performance assessment and feedback mechanism.
Conclusion and contact slide for training program information.

confidence_rationale: Video is clearly instructional/educational content with narrated overlays, title slides, and multiple teaching sequences. It documents a team training program at Catharina Hospital using Simbionix LAP Mentor simulator. No individual FLS task performance is being scored; instead, the video demonstrates team-based surgical training concepts, role distribution, non-technical skills development, and integrated feedback systems.
cannot_determine: Specific FLS task being trained (appears to involve suturing/knot-tying based on endoscopic views, but no single task is isolated)
Individual trainee completion times or performance metrics
Specific technical penalties for any trainee

demonstrated_techniques: Team-based laparoscopic training setup with multiple simultaneous participants
Real-time endoscopic feedback integration for performance monitoring
Virtual tool selection and anticipatory decision-making
verbal_cues: Team training provides high fidelity technical practice for all participants
Enhancing communication skills, optimizing coordination and cooperation within the team
Master the roles and responsibilities of the main surgeon
Improving decision-making in both routine and emergency situations
Scrub nurse may virtually select tools and practice anticipation of surgeon's needs
common_errors_addressed: Lack of team communication and coordination
Poor anticipation of surgical needs by support staff
Inadequate role clarity in team-based procedures
Difficulty transitioning between routine and emergency scenarios

video_type_summary: This is an educational/promotional video documenting a LAP Mentor team training program. It is NOT a recording of an individual trainee attempting an FLS task for scoring. Instead, it showcases: (1) team-based surgical training methodology, (2) integration of technical and non-technical skills, (3) role simulation for surgical teams, and (4) real-time performance feedback systems. The video is designed for training program promotion and education about best practices in laparoscopic surgery team training.
note: NO FLS SCORE COMPUTED - This is instructional content, not a performance attempt. Return to user for clarification if a specific trainee performance video is intended for FLS scoring.
